'''√g-h-?''' ('''gho''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:live|live]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:live|live]]
|-
! Citation form
| √g-h-?
|-
! Lemma
| gho
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigaha?|thigaha?]] || [[word:jigaha?|jigaha?]] || [[word:shigaha?|shigaha?]] || [[word:kigaha?|kigaha?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugaha?|thuthugaha?]] || [[word:jujugaha?|jujugaha?]] || [[word:shushugaha?|shushugaha?]] || [[word:kukugaha?|kukugaha?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugaha?|thugaha?]] || [[word:jugaha?|jugaha?]] || [[word:shugaha?|shugaha?]] || [[word:kugaha?|kugaha?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugaha?|thugaha?]] || [[word:jugaha?|jugaha?]] || [[word:shugaha?|shugaha?]] || [[word:kugaha?|kugaha?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegaha?|thegaha?]] || [[word:jegaha?|jegaha?]] || [[word:shegaha?|shegaha?]] || [[word:kegaha?|kegaha?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogaha?|thothogaha?]] || [[word:jojogaha?|jojogaha?]] || [[word:shoshogaha?|shoshogaha?]] || [[word:kokogaha?|kokogaha?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogaha?|thogaha?]] || [[word:jogaha?|jogaha?]] || [[word:shogaha?|shogaha?]] || [[word:kogaha?|kogaha?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogaha?|thogaha?]] || [[word:jogaha?|jogaha?]] || [[word:shogaha?|shogaha?]] || [[word:kogaha?|kogaha?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thægaha?|thægaha?]] || [[word:jægaha?|jægaha?]] || [[word:shægaha?|shægaha?]] || [[word:kægaha?|kægaha?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagaha?|thathagaha?]] || [[word:jajagaha?|jajagaha?]] || [[word:shashagaha?|shashagaha?]] || [[word:kakagaha?|kakagaha?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagaha?|thagaha?]] || [[word:jagaha?|jagaha?]] || [[word:shagaha?|shagaha?]] || [[word:kagaha?|kagaha?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagaha?|thagaha?]] || [[word:jagaha?|jagaha?]] || [[word:shagaha?|shagaha?]] || [[word:kagaha?|kagaha?]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagaha?|shagaha?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagaha?|goshagaha?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagaha?|gokishagaha?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagaha?nü|shagaha?nü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagaha?nknü|goshagaha?nknü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagaha?nü|gokishagaha?nü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagaha?shë|shagaha?shë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkshë|goshagaha?nkshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagaha?shë|gokishagaha?shë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagaha?ro|shagaha?ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkro|goshagaha?nkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagaha?ro|gokishagaha?ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagaha?mu|shagaha?mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkmu|goshagaha?nkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagaha?mu|gokishagaha?mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagaha?sher|shagaha?sher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagaha?nksher|goshagaha?nksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagaha?sher|gokishagaha?sher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagaha?ng|shagaha?ng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkng|goshagaha?nkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagaha?ng|gokishagaha?ng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagaha?ya|shagaha?ya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkya|goshagaha?nkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagaha?ya|gokishagaha?ya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagaha?yam|shagaha?yam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkyam|goshagaha?nkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagaha?yam|gokishagaha?yam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagaha?nüshë|shagaha?nüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagaha?nknüshë|goshagaha?nknüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagaha?nüshë|gokishagaha?nüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagaha?nüro|shagaha?nüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagaha?nknüro|goshagaha?nknüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagaha?nüro|gokishagaha?nüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagaha?nümu|shagaha?nümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagaha?nknümu|goshagaha?nknümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagaha?nümu|gokishagaha?nümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagaha?shënü|shagaha?shënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkshënü|goshagaha?nkshënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagaha?shënü|gokishagaha?shënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagaha?shëro|shagaha?shëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkshëro|goshagaha?nkshëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagaha?shëro|gokishagaha?shëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagaha?shëmu|shagaha?shëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkshëmu|goshagaha?nkshëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagaha?shëmu|gokishagaha?shëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagaha?ronü|shagaha?ronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkronü|goshagaha?nkronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagaha?ronü|gokishagaha?ronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagaha?roshë|shagaha?roshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkroshë|goshagaha?nkroshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagaha?roshë|gokishagaha?roshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagaha?romu|shagaha?romu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkromu|goshagaha?nkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagaha?romu|gokishagaha?romu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagaha?munü|shagaha?munü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkmunü|goshagaha?nkmunü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagaha?munü|gokishagaha?munü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagaha?mushë|shagaha?mushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkmushë|goshagaha?nkmushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagaha?mushë|gokishagaha?mushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagaha?muro|shagaha?muro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagaha?nkmuro|goshagaha?nkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagaha?muro|gokishagaha?muro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
